text: Octopuses have three hearts. Two pump blood to the gills, one pumps it to the rest of the body.
Honey never spoils. Archaeologists found 3000-year-old honey in Egyptian tombs still edible.
Bananas are berries. Strawberries are not.
A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus.
The Eiffel Tower grows 15 cm taller in summer due to thermal expansion.
Wombat poop is cube-shaped to prevent it from rolling away.
There are more trees on Earth than stars in the Milky Way.
The stomach lining replaces itself every few days to prevent digesting itself.
A group of flamingos is called a 'flamboyance'.
The world's oldest known joke is from 1900 BCE — a Sumerian proverb about a dog.
Cows have best friends and get stressed when separated.
The dot over 'i' and 'j' is called a 'tittle'.
Scotland's national animal is the unicorn.
Polar bear skin is black. Their fur is transparent, not white.
Butterflies taste with their feet.
The human nose can remember up to 50,000 different scents.
A jiffy is an actual unit of time: 1/100th of a second.
Octopuses can taste with their arms.
The shortest war in history lasted 38 minutes (Anglo-Zanzibar War, 1896).
Sloths can hold their breath longer than dolphins.
The Minecraft Creeper was originally a pig model that was accidentally rotated sideways.
The GitHub logo Octocat has five toes — a fact hidden in plain sight.
The first-ever YouTube video was 'Me at the zoo' uploaded on April 23, 2005.
A single Minecraft block is 1 cubic meter.
The world's first website (info.cern.ch) is still online.
The Ctrl+Z undo command was invented by computer scientist Larry Tesler.
Google was originally called 'Backrub'.
The first computer virus was created in 1983. It was called 'Elk Cloner'.
More people own a phone than a toothbrush.
The loading spinner is called a 'throbber'.
The first item sold on eBay was a broken laser pointer.
There is a place in Japan where you can rent a 'crying service' (someone who cries on your behalf).
A literal translation of 'Vietnam' means 'Southern Viet people'.
Phở was originally called 'xáo trâu' (buffalo stir-fry noodles).
The nón lá (conical hat) has been worn for over 3000 years.
Ha Long Bay has over 1,600 limestone islands.
Vietnam is the world's second largest coffee exporter.
The Imperial City of Huế took 30 years to build.
More people in the world have seen Minecraft gameplay than have seen the Eiffel Tower in person.
The human brain can store about 2.5 petabytes of data.
